metadata.title:
WHAT'S THE MATTER With


THIS OLD WORLD?

pages.raw_text:
He's only one of the down and
out"


He isn't working.


Huh, must be hobo.


Well, that's what he is. He says
so himself, In a letter he has writ
ten to The Press.


He says that he has gone hum
cry for days. That he hasn't
worked. That he has begged.


oh, goodness, call the police!


But wait a minute! Read his
letter, and see II you don't think
that maybe the fellow who wrote II
might be human being after all.


Here's what he has to say:


Editor Press: Having heard
that you have assisted other poor
unfortunate people in getting jobs
Thought | would drop you a line
| am a young man 80 years of age
and broke. Have went hungry for
days. But heard through some
other boys that they were giving
